title: Carrier's (CARR) Q1 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Carrier Global's (CARR) first-quarter results reflect strength in the HVAC and Fire & Security segments.

title: Carrier Global Corporation (CARR) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Carrier Global Corporation (CARR) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript.

title: Carrier Global (CARR) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Carrier Global (CARR) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Carrier Global (CARR) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Carrier Global (CARR) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.52 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.49 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.54 per share a year ago.

title: Carrier Announces Portfolio Transformation to Create Global Leader in Intelligent Climate and Energy Solutions
text: Carrier to acquire Viessmann Climate Solutions for €12 billion in cash and stock issued directly to Viessmann Group with a long-term ownership commitment Most attractive asset in the most attractive segment: premier company with highly differentiated channel, customer access and technology significantly enhances Carrier's strategy to capitalize on the rapid energy transition in Europe Creates the most comprehensive and differentiated suite of sustainable technologies and services, which Carrier can scale globally Carrier plans to exit its Fire & Security and Commercial Refrigeration businesses Transforms Carrier into a pure-play, more focused, higher growth global market leader Carrier will host a conference call Wednesday, April 26 at 7:30 a.m. ET PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla.

title: Carrier Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: Net sales up 13% versus first quarter 2022; organic sales up 4% GAAP EPS of $0.44 and adjusted EPS of $0.52 Net cash inflows from operating activities were $120 million and free cash flow generation was $50 million Reaffirming full-year 2023 guidance for sales, adjusted operating margin, adjusted EPS and free cash flow* PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. , April 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE:CARR), a global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, today reported strong financial results for the first quarter of 2023 and reiterated its full year guidance.

title: Carrier Nears $13 Billion Deal for German Industrial Manufacturer Viessmann
text: Carrier Global is in advanced talks to acquire German industrial manufacturer Viessmann for about $13 billion including debt, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Link Logistics, Carrier Global to jointly manage energy across Link network
text: Link Logistics, a national last-mile logistics real estate company, and Carrier Global Corp., (NYSE: CARR) a global provider of energy services, said they will collaborate to deliver energy management and analytics across Link's 550 million-square-foot facility network. The collaboration is designed to enhance energy efficiency for Link's assets and more than 11,000 customers, the companies said in an announcement earlier this week.

title: EPA National Vehicle and Fuel Emissions Laboratory Awards $130 Million Contract to NORESCO
text: New guaranteed savings program will help decarbonize critical buildings and provide capital improvements while supporting operations and maintenance WESTBOROUGH, Mass. , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The U.S. Environmental Protection Agency's (EPA) National Vehicle and Fuel Emissions Laboratory (NVFEL) in Ann Arbor, Michigan, selected energy and sustainable solutions provider NORESCO to implement a new decarbonization program through an energy savings performance contract (ESPC).

title: Carrier (CARR) Boosts France Presence With Transicold Plans
text: Carrier's (CARR) Transicold expands its network of service centers in France to ensure high-quality, fast, and efficient services.

title: Link Logistics and Carrier Collaborate to Drive Value Through Energy Efficiency
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Link Logistics (“Link”), a leading national last-mile logistics real estate company designed to meet the needs of the modern supply chain, and Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), the leading global provider of healthy, safe, sustainable and intelligent building and cold chain solutions, today announced a collaboration to deliver energy management and analytics across Link's enterprise portfolio.

title: Carrier Global Explores Strategic Alternatives For Its Fire And Safety Business Unit
text: CARR, $44.30, Market Capitalization: $37.0 billion), a leading global provider of healthy, safe, sustainable, and intelligent building and cold chain solutions, announced that it is exploring strategic alternatives for its Fire & Safety business unit.

title: 7 Industrial Stocks to Buy for April 2023
text: Industrial stocks are not flashy or cutting edge. They are often railroads, construction companies, or firms that make heating and ventilation equipment.

title: Here's Why Carrier Global (CARR) is a Strong Value Stock

title: Carrier Is A Fantastic Dividend Growth Stock
text: Carrier is a fascinating dividend growth stock with a 1.7% yield and strong double-digit dividend growth. While Carrier was founded more than 100 years ago, it benefits from strong secular tailwinds and its focus on aftermarket sales.

title: Carrier Plots Separation of Fire Unit
text: The air-conditioning company aims to sell or spin off its fire and security business.

title: Carrier First Quarter Earnings Advisory
